commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And they said, The man asked us carefully of our state, and of our kindred, saying, Is your father yet alive. have you another brother. and we told him according to the tenor of these words: could we in any way know that he would say, Bring your brother down. This is perfectly consonant with what they say, chap. 13, and chap. They mentioned their having a brother at home, without the smallest suspicion of doing wrong.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
